description: Phase 5: Intelligence - A/B testing (variants, traffic split, auto-winner selection), Send time optimization (timezone-aware, open-time tracking, predictive scheduling), Advanced analytics (sequence funnels, cohort analysis, revenue attribution, CSV export), and Performance benchmarks (industry comparisons, improvement suggestions).
steps: 1. Add Prisma models: AbTest (id, sequenceStepId, name, status: draft/running/completed, winnerVariantId?, startedAt, completedAt, createdAt, updatedAt), AbTestVariant (id, testId, name, subject?, body?, weight: Int default 50, sentCount, openCount, clickCount, replyCount, createdAt), SendTimePreference (id, leadId, timezone, preferredHour, preferredDay, openCount, dataPoints, updatedAt), AnalyticsSnapshot (id, type: funnel/cohort/revenue, entityId, entityType, data Json, periodStart, periodEnd, createdAt), PerformanceBenchmark (id, metric, industryAverage, userValue, percentile, suggestions String[], calculatedAt, createdAt).
3. Add shared types: AB_TEST_STATUS, ANALYTICS_SNAPSHOT_TYPE, BENCHMARK_METRIC in packages/shared/src/types/index.ts.
4. Add schemas: abTestSchema, abTestVariantSchema, sendTimePreferenceSchema, analyticsSnapshotSchema in packages/shared/src/schemas/index.ts.

5. Create apps/api/src/services/ab-testing.ts: createTest(sequenceStepId, variants[]), startTest(testId), assignVariant(testId, leadId) - splits traffic by weight, recordResult(variantId, metric), checkSignificance(testId) - basic chi-square or z-test for statistical significance, selectWinner(testId), getTestResults(testId).

6. Create apps/api/src/services/send-time-optimizer.ts: recordOpenTime(leadId, openedAt), getOptimalSendTime(leadId) - returns best hour/day based on historical opens, getOptimalTimeForTimezone(timezone) - aggregate for timezone, scheduleOptimalSend(messageId, leadId) - delay until optimal time.

7. Create apps/api/src/services/advanced-analytics.ts: getSequenceFunnel(sequenceId) - enrolled/opened/clicked/replied/converted counts, getCohortAnalysis(sequenceId, period) - compare cohorts by enrollment week, getRevenueAttribution(sequenceId) - sum deal values attributed to sequence, exportAnalyticsCSV(type, filters).

8. Create apps/api/src/services/benchmarks.ts: calculateBenchmarks(workspaceId) - compare open rate, reply rate, bounce rate against industry averages, generateSuggestions(metrics) - return actionable suggestions based on where user is below average.
9. Create apps/api/src/routes/ab-tests.ts: GET /api/ab-tests, POST /api/ab-tests, GET /api/ab-tests/:id, POST /api/ab-tests/:id/start, POST /api/ab-tests/:id/complete, GET /api/ab-tests/:id/results.
13. Register all routes in apps/api/src/index.ts behind requireAuth.
14. Update mockDb.ts with abTest, abTestVariant, sendTimePreference, analyticsSnapshot, performanceBenchmark models.
15. Add factory functions: buildAbTest, buildAbTestVariant, buildSendTimePreference, buildAnalyticsSnapshot, buildPerformanceBenchmark.
16. Create service tests: ab-testing.test.ts, send-time-optimizer.test.ts, advanced-analytics.test.ts, benchmarks.test.ts.
17. Create route tests: ab-tests.test.ts, send-optimization.test.ts, advanced-analytics.test.ts, benchmarks.test.ts.
acceptance_criteria: A/B tests can be created with multiple variants and traffic is split by weight
Statistical significance check determines a winner
Send time optimization recommends best hour based on historical open data
Sequence funnel shows enrolled -> opened -> clicked -> replied -> converted
Cohort analysis compares performance by enrollment period
Revenue attribution sums deal values attributed to sequences
Analytics can be exported as CSV
Benchmarks compare user metrics against industry averages
verification: Run `npm test` from /projects/sandbox/lead-genius-pre- and confirm all tests pass
Run `npx tsc --noEmit` in apps/api to confirm no TypeScript errors
